metadata.description: Quiver — Raine Soriano's collection of Claude Code skills and plugins. Each skill is an arrow you can pull out when you need it.

plugins.name: perplexity-research
plugins.description: Run deep research / advanced research / 'perplexity research' on a topic — multi-step web browsing with citations via Perplexity's Agent API. Enforces a plan-approval workflow, output-budget gating to prevent truncation, and a structured sourced report (TL;DR, comparison tables, inline citations, Sources table, Where-sources-disagree, Confidence & gaps). Use for sourced briefs, competitive analysis, market research, GTM or landing-page audits, feature comparisons, market stack-rank for expansion, investor-memo background, or due-diligence briefs.
